---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior in the FSR Calculator
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: eduardolopez-collab
---

## Description
A clear description of what went wrong.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Select service '...'
3. Enter values '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, attach a screenshot.

## Environment
- Browser: (e.g. Chrome 124, Edge 122)
- OS: (e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14)
- Theme: Dark / Light
- File version: (check the topbar — e.g. v3.0)

## Section Affected
- [ ] Request Details
- [ ] Service Container (Benchmark / Proposal)
- [ ] Vendor Bids
- [ ] Pricing Summary
- [ ] Cost Breakdown
- [ ] FSR Log
- [ ] Print / Save as PDF
- [ ] Other: ___

## Additional Context
Any other relevant information (e.g. specific service, city, or bid values that trigger the issue).
